## Use a specialized PR template

Please open this PR with one of the templates in `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/`:

- `bugfix.md`
- `feature.md`
- `refactor.md`
- `docs.md`
- `chore.md`

If your PR was opened without a type-specific template, re-open it with `?template=<name>.md` or copy the correct template content into this PR body.
